title: BRANDLE OS — ENGRAMAESTRO THREAD VAULT III INTEGRATION PACK

sections.title: Source Ingested

sections.title: 4TRESS Safety

summary: Integrates Thread Vault III system designs into BRANDLE OS, locking implementation details for the four core engines plus growth hooks and safety guardrails.
